title: test(1796d): add 36 tests for internal-chat-reads.ts and internal-chat-service-helpers.ts
body:
## Summary

36 new tests for two zero-coverage internal-chat submodules.

### internal-chat-reads.ts — 13 tests

`createInternalChatReads` uses a lazy-init delegation pattern:
- Before `init()`: all 5 methods exist but throw (delegates are `undefined`)
- After `init(deps)`: methods delegate to the provided mock stores
- `init()` can be called multiple times — last wins
- Covers: `getUnreadSummary`, `listRecentConversations`, `listGroupMembersOrDmPeers`, `listGroupMembersOrDmPeersByAccount`

### internal-chat-service-helpers.ts — 23 tests

Permission-checking and lookup helpers:
- Simple delegation: `getRequiredAccount`, `getRequiredAgentAccount`, `listGroupMembersOrDmPeers`, `listGroupMembersOrDmPeersByAccount`
- Error throws: `getRequiredExternalAccount` (ExternalAccountNotFoundError for agent accounts)
- Error throws: `getRequiredAccountBySlug` (InternalChatAccountNotFoundError on null slug)
- Membership checks: `requireConversationMembership`, `requireConversationMembershipByAccount`
- Conversation lookups: `getRequiredConversationForAccount` (ConversationNotFoundError)
- Group validation: `getRequiredGroupForAccount` (ChatGroupNotFoundError for DM conversations)
- Agent variants: `getRequiredConversationForAgent`, `getRequiredGroupForAgent`

All 36 tests pass.
Part of #1796 coverage expansion.
head: fix/1796d-internal-chat-reads-tests
